title: Donut Orders
body:
## Notes Lightweight singleplayer mod that recreates a **DonutSMP-inspired orders menu** for testing order flows, pricing, item amounts, and collection behavior locally. This mod is intentionally for singleplayer only. It is not a DonutSMP cheat, macro, script, bypass, marketplace bot, or public-server automation tool.

## Features - Opens with `/order` or `/orders` - Includes refresh, sort, filter, search, and your-orders controls - Create new orders through a DonutSMP-style item selection flow - Edit item, amount, and price before confirming - Price `0` is allowed - Amount `0` creates an infinite order - Confirmed orders are instantly delivered locally - Finite orders can be collected or dropped - Infinite orders can be collected repeatedly - Includes cancel confirmation before deleting an order

## Commands ```text /order /orders ```

## Why **Why use this mod?** Donut Orders gives you a local way to preview and practice the DonutSMP-style order menu without connecting to a public server or touching a real economy. **Does this buy or sell items on DonutSMP?** No. It does not interact with DonutSMP, simulate other players, withdraw money, fulfill public orders, or send marketplace automation to a server. **Who is this mod for?** Anyone who wants a singleplayer mockup for testing, screenshots, videos, or learning the order menu flow.

## Support Bug reports, suggestions, and questions can be posted [here](https://discord.gg/t9GQ4abDFA). This project is not affiliated with DonutSMP, Mojang, or Microsoft. It is a fan-made singleplayer GUI utility inspired by observed order menu behavior.
